channel.title: USMLE Prep Platform — Free Study Guides & Practice Questions
channel.description: Free USMLE Step 1, Step 2 CK & Step 3 practice questions with multi-language explanations in English, Chinese, and Spanish. Study guides, exam strategies, and tips for international medical graduates (IMGs).

item.title: USMLE Step 1 Study Plan for IMGs: Complete 6-Month Strategy Guide
item.description: Preparing for USMLE Step 1 as an international medical graduate? This comprehensive guide covers a 6-month study plan including recommended resources, daily schedules, and strategies for mastering basic sciences.

item.title: USMLE Step 2 CK High-Yield Topics: What to Focus On for a 250+ Score
item.description: Discover the highest-yield topics for USMLE Step 2 CK. Learn which clinical subjects deserve the most attention in your study plan and how to approach challenging question types.

item.title: Why Multi-Language USMLE Study Works: The Science Behind Bilingual Learning
item.description: Research shows that studying in multiple languages enhances comprehension and retention. Learn why using Chinese and Spanish explanations alongside English can accelerate your USMLE preparation.

item.title: USMLE Step 3 Complete Guide for IMG Residents: CCS Cases, Biostats & Study Strategy
item.description: A complete guide to USMLE Step 3 for IMG residents. Learn how to tackle CCS (Computer-based Case Simulations), master biostatistics questions, and manage your study time during residency.
